questions.question: On what popular 80's family sitcom would you find Alex, Mallory, Jennifer, and later, Andrew Keaton?
What term, originally about an area in California, was applied to any young female who was ditzy, shallow, materialistic, and had a limited vocabulary?
Remember when malls were a thing? What singer performed "The Beautiful You: Celebrating the Good Life Shopping Mall Tour '87"?
Why were Brits not crazy about eating hamburgers in the 80s?
What was the famous 1978 Alka-Seltzer jingle that included the sounds the product made?
questions.answer: "Plop, plop, fizz, fizz, Oh what a relief it is."
